name: Post-Service Thank You (TEST)
Google & Yelp Review Request — After Service
description: Sends a Google review request SMS 30 minutes after an appointment is marked completed. Limited to once per customer per 30 days.

name: Google & Yelp Review Request — After Purchase
description: Sends a Google review request SMS 30 minutes after a POS transaction completes. Limited to once per customer per 30 days.
